## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (invisible chars defined with `\u` escapes)
- [ ] New code points cite a reference (Unicode chart / CVE / confusables)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] Public API stays minimal and zero-dependency
- [ ] Default behavior still preserves visible text (destructive = opt-in)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (for user-facing changes)
